title: Miracle Gro Soluble Ericaceous Plant Food 500g Fertiliser for Azalea, Camellia, Rhododendron, Blueberries & Acid-Loving Plants Fast Growth, Greener Leaves & More Blooms Pink - 1 Pack (500g)
features: Supports Acid-Loving Plants: Specially formulated for ericaceous plants such as azalea, camellia, rhododendron, magnolia, pieris, skimmia, blueberries, and more.
Fast Acting with Visible Results: Promotes greener leaves and stronger blooms within 14 days of first use when applied regularly throughout the growing season.
Boosts Growth & Prevents Yellowing: Contains essential nutrients and added iron to stop leaf yellowing and promote lush, healthy foliage.
Easy to Use & Versatile: Dissolve in water and apply using a watering can or hose-end feeder. Suitable for indoor and outdoor use on all ericaceous plants.
Feeds Every 2 Weeks: Use from March to September for season-long support. Encourages strong roots, resistance to drought, and rich flower colour.
description: Product description Miracle-Gro Azalea, Camellia & Rhododendron Soluble Plant Food is a premium formula designed specifically for acid-loving plants. Available in both 500g and 1kg sizes, this plant food contains a unique mix of 11 nutrients to encourage lush green foliage and vibrant, long-lasting blooms. Ideal for use on azaleas, rhododendrons, camellias, magnolias, pieris, blueberries, skimmia, raspberries, and more, it also contains sequestered iron to help prevent yellowing leaves—a common issue in lime-hating plants. This water-soluble fertilizer is easy to apply: simply dissolve the recommended amount in water and apply around the plant’s base or over the leaves. Use every two weeks from March to September for the best results. Within 14 days, you’ll notice healthier, greener, and more beautiful plants. Whether used with a watering can or a hose-end feeder, this product supports strong root growth, enhanced drought resistance, and a visibly improved display. Key Benefits: Feeds acid-loving plants effectively Supports fast growth and healthy root systems Extra iron prevents leaf yellowing Visible improvement in 2 weeks Suitable for all outdoor and indoor ericaceous plants Directions for Use: Mix the correct amount of feed with water Apply using a watering can or hose-end feeder Feed every 2 weeks from March to September Make your garden bloom beautifully with Miracle-Gro Ericaceous Plant Food—a trusted solution for greener, stronger, and more vibrant plants. Directions Mix the correct amount of feed with water. Apply using a watering can or hose-end feeder. Feed every 2 weeks from March to September.
